Iran 🇮🇷 has adapted to US 🇺🇸 air defenses, reports WSJ, citing US officials. It is now allegedly using missiles with maneuverable re-entry vehicles. Iran's increased accuracy has also raised concerns that it is getting targeting help from China 🇨🇳 or Russia 🇷🇺.

Notable: US 🇺🇸 explicitly targeted IRGC personnel for the first time since resumption of war, in response to deadly attack in Jordan 🇯🇴. IRGC reportedly has 190,000+ troops (~15,000 in Aerospace Force). Iranian Army has ~350,000 (~37,000 in Air Force). For it to really hurt, US needs to target IRGC leadership.

US 🇺🇸 CENTCOM says it has completed another wave of strikes in Iran 🇮🇷 at 11:30 PM ET. Strikes targeted military coastal surveillance and air defense facilities, maritime capabilities, missile and drone storage sites, and IRGC forces that launched attacks on US service members in Jordan Friday night.

Major Iranian 🇮🇷 attacks Saturday: JORDAN 🇯🇴: Two US 🇺🇸 service members were killed overnight Friday in an Iranian missile attack on Muwaffaq Salti Air Base; a third service member is missing. KUWAIT 🇰🇼: Iran 🇮🇷 targeted two power and desalination plants and a Kuwait Petroleum Corporation oil facility, causing damage. Several Kuwaiti firefighters were injured while responding to fires caused by the attacks. Iran's IRGC says it targeted US 🇺🇸 assets at Camp Arifjan, Ali Al Salem Air Base, and al-Ahmadi port. BAHRAIN 🇧🇭: Iran 🇮🇷 reportedly targeted Sheikh Isa Air Base, a US 🇺🇸 drone depot, and an AI data center.

IRGC Khatam-al Anbiya Central Headquarters commander Maj. Gen. Ali Abdollahi threatened a "devastating response" to any "US savagery," pledging allegiance to Mojtaba Khamenei. Quite a long message, in case you wanna read it fully: "In the name of God, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful Continuing the luminous path of the martyred leader of the Ummah and the revered martyrs of Islamic Iran and the resistance front, we once again pledge to the wise and insightful leader of the Islamic Revolution and the Supreme Commander-in-Chief, Ayatollah Seyyed Mojtaba Khamenei, may his shadow be prolonged, that we will adopt his clear and radiant message regarding the protection of the revolution's ideals, sacred unity, and national cohesion as a guiding principle within the armed forces. We will employ all our strength and capacity to further strengthen solidarity, unity, and integration among the armed forces, the people, and conscientious officials across the three branches of government to guarantee the interests of the Iranian nation, defend the rights of the people, and ensure national security. Adhering to the commands and strategies of our esteemed leader and commander, dearer to us than our own lives, we also remind the Great Satan, the criminal, treacherous, and deceitful American enemy, that any greed, bullying, expansionism, and brutality will be met with a decisive and devastating response from the faithful, courageous, and powerful warriors in the armed forces. We will impose upon them costs heavier than those of the second and third imposed wars. The defensive power of our beloved country serves, on one hand, as a solid pillar for the peace and security of the proud and brave nation from south to north and from east to west of this honorable and vast land of Iran. On the other hand, it provides a platform for the dedicated officials of the country to serve and work for the welfare and prosperity of the honorable people. The enemy camp, following successive defeats in military warfare, has placed its hopes on creating divisions and discord between the people and officials. This is because the rout of the Great Satan, criminal America, depends on internal cohesion. Serious confrontation with this diabolical conspiracy to disappoint the enemy is essential and necessary for all. With the help of Almighty God, the grace of the Imam of the Age, may God hasten his reappearance, and under the guidance of our dear leader, we will safeguard the cohesion arising from the unprecedented and historic resurrection and the high standard set by the nation mobilized to bid farewell to the martyred Imam of the Ummah and the free people of the world, with all our strength and capacity. Major General Pilot Ali Abdollahi Commander of Khatam al-Anbia Central Headquarters"

RT by @no_itsmyturn: ‼️ Lebanese President Joseph Aoun has arrived in Washington, D.C., for the first official presidential visit to the US by a Lebanese president in 17 years. His four-day visit will begin with a meeting with Secretary Rubio before the Secretary departs for Asia on Sunday. President Aoun will then meet with U.S. senators, members of Congress, and thinktnakers. The visit will culminate in a summit with President Trump at the White House on Tuesday.

RT by @IntelDoge: Worldwide Caution: Due to heightened tensions in the Middle East, the security environment remains complex with the potential for unforeseen escalation. We remind Americans in the region of the continued need for caution and encourage them to monitor the news for breaking developments.  The Department of State advises Americans worldwide, and especially in the Middle East, to exercise increased caution. Americans abroad should follow the guidance in security alerts issued by the nearest U.S. embassy or consulate. Flight cancellations and periodic airspace closures may cause travel disruptions. U.S. diplomatic facilities, including outside the Middle East, have been targeted. Groups supportive of Iran may target other U.S. interests overseas or locations associated with the United States and/or Americans throughout the world. Please read carefully our Travel Advisory, country information, and any recent security alerts when planning travel at http://travel.state.gov/destination. Full alert: https://travel.state.gov/en/international-travel/travel-advisories/global-events/worldwide-caution.html.

RT by @no_itsmyturn: CENTCOM Statement on Recently Fallen, Missing U.S. Service Members TAMPA, Fla. — On July 17, two U.S. service members in Jordan were killed in action as U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) and partner forces defended against Iranian ballistic missile and drone attacks. Additionally, one service member is currently missing. Four American service members were medically evacuated to Jordanian hospitals. They have since been discharged. Other personnel who were evaluated for minor injuries have returned to duty. Out of respect for the families, CENTCOM will withhold additional information, including the identities of the fallen warriors, until 24 hours after the next of kin have been notified.
